segments.text: The Lord reigns, let the earth rejoice;
let the many coastlands be glad.
Clouds and thick darkness are all around him;
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Fire goes before him
and burns up his adversaries all around.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: His lightnings light up the world;
the earth sees and trembles.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The mountains melt like wax before the Lord,
before the Lord of the whole earth.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The heavens proclaim his righteousness,
and all the peoples see his glory.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All worshipers of images are put to shame,
who make their boast in worthless idols;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: worship him, all you gods!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Zion hears and is glad,
and the daughters of Judah rejoice,
because of your judgments, O Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you, O Lord, are most high over all the earth;
you are exalted far above all gods.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: O you who love the Lord, hate evil!
He preserves the lives of his saints;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: he delivers them from the hand of the wicked.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Light is sown for the righteous,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and joy for the upright in heart.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Rejoice in the Lord, O you righteous,
and give thanks to his holy name!
segments.speaker: God
